chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2165 OF 2024 Khan Zaman Versus Province of Sindh & others A N D C.P. No.D-3756 of 2024 Raja Khan Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of stay applications. 2. For hearing of main cases. Dated: 29.10.2024 Mr. Zia-ul-Haq Makhdoom for petitioner in C.P. No.D-2165/2024. Mr. Arif Shaikh for petitioner in C.P. No.D-3756/2024. Mr. Jawad Dero, Addl. Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Waleed Khanzada for respondent No.4. Mr. Ahmed Ali Ghumro for respondent No.5. -.-.- A statement dated 24.10.2024 along with compliance report dated 22.10.2024 is already filed by learned Addl. Advocate General annexing therewith notification dated 21.10.2024, which are available on record. The notification speaks that in compliance of order passed in these petitions (C.P. No.D-2165/2024) and with the approval of the competent authority Mr. Latif Khan Senior Private Secretary of Karachi Water & Sewerage Corporation who was earlier working on detailment basis for Local Government & HTP Department, Government of Sindh, stands relieved from 31.05.2024. On this understanding and/or compliance, by consent both the petitions are disposed of accordingly along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
